info.name: Gym Management System API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for NestJS Gym Management System. Includes authentication, member management, trainers, classes, subscriptions, financial tracking, attendance, and analytics endpoints.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: User authentication endpoints - Login to get JWT token

request.description:
Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT token for subsequent API calls.

**Response:**
- `userid`: User identifier
- `access_token`: JWT token (use in Authorization header as `Bearer <token>`)

**Example:**
```json
{
  "userid": "usr_1234567890abcdef",
  "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
}
```

Logout user and invalidate JWT token. Client should discard the token after successful logout.

**Note:** For JWT, logout is typically client-side by discarding the token. This endpoint acknowledges logout and can perform server-side cleanup if token blacklist is implemented.

item.name: 🏢 Gym & Branch Management
item.description: Multi-tenant gym and branch management endpoints

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Fitness World Elite",
  "address": "123 Main Street, Downtown",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "email": "contact@fitnessworld.com",
  "description": "Premium fitness center with state-of-the-art equipment"
}

request.description: Creates a new gym location. Requires admin privileges. The gym will be associated with the current user's organization.
Retrieves all gyms in the system.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific gym including its branches and statistics.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Fitness World - Downtown",
  "gymId": "gym_1234567890abcdef",
  "address": "456 Downtown Ave, Suite 100",
  "phone": "+1234567891",
  "email": "downtown@fitnessworld.com",
  "capacity": 200,
  "openingHours": "06:00-23:00"
}

request.description: Creates a new branch for a gym. Branches are physical locations where members can visit.
Retrieves all branches across all gyms.

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "email": "john.doe@example.com",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-01-01",
  "address": "123 Main St, City, State",
  "emergencyContact": {
    "name": "Jane Doe",
    "phone": "+0987654321",
    "relationship": "Spouse"
  },
  "membershipPlanId": 1,
  "branchId": "branch_123"
}

request.description:
Registers a new gym member with personal details and membership information.

**Note:** This creates both a member profile and an associated user account for system access.

Retrieves all members with optional filtering by branch, status, or search term.

**Query Parameters:**
- `branchId`: Filter by specific branch
- `status`: Filter by membership status (active/inactive)
- `search`: Search members by name or email
Retrieves detailed information about a specific member including membership status and recent activity.
Updates member information such as personal details, contact information, or membership status.
Permanently deletes a member account and all associated data. Requires admin privileges. This action cannot be undone.
Retrieves comprehensive dashboard data including subscriptions, attendance, and goals for a member.
Retrieves all members assigned to a specific branch.

item.name: 💪 Trainers & Classes
item.description: Trainer management and fitness class scheduling

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "email": "john.smith@gym.com",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "specializations": ["Personal Training", "Weight Training", "Cardio"],
  "experience": 5,
  "certifications": ["ACE Certified Personal Trainer", "CPR Certified"],
  "branchId": "branch_123",
  "bio": "Experienced trainer with 5+ years in fitness industry"
}

request.description: Registers a new trainer with their specializations and contact information. Trainers can be assigned to specific branches.
Retrieves all trainers with optional filtering by branch or specialization.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific trainer including their specializations, availability schedule, assigned classes, and member feedback ratings.
Retrieves all trainers assigned to a specific branch.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Morning Yoga",
  "description": "Relaxing yoga session for all levels",
  "category": "yoga",
  "trainerId": 456,
  "branchId": "branch_123",
  "maxCapacity": 20,
  "duration": 60,
  "schedule": {
    "dayOfWeek": 1,
    "startTime": "07:00",
    "endTime": "08:00"
  },
  "isActive": true
}

request.description: Creates a new fitness class/session that members can enroll in. Includes scheduling and capacity information.
Retrieves all classes with optional filtering by branch, timing, or day.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific fitness class including schedule, capacity, instructor details, and current enrollment status.
Retrieves all fitness classes available at a specific branch.

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 123,
  "membershipPlanId": 1,
  "startDate": "2024-01-01",
  "billingCycle": "monthly",
  "paymentMethod": "credit_card",
  "autoRenew": true,
  "notes": "VIP membership upgrade"
}

request.description: Creates a new subscription linking a member to a specific membership plan. Handles billing cycles, payment status, and plan activation.

query.description: Number of subscriptions per page (default: 20, max: 100)

request.description:
Retrieves comprehensive list of all membership subscriptions with filtering, pagination, and analytics.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page`, `limit`: Pagination
- `memberId`, `status`, `planType`: Filters
- `startDateFrom`, `startDateTo`: Date range filters
- `expiredOnly`, `dueForRenewal`: Status filters
- `sortBy`, `sortOrder`: Sorting options
Retrieves detailed information about a specific subscription including complete member details, plan information, billing history, payment status, and access permissions.
Cancels an active subscription with specified cancellation timing (immediate or end of billing period). Handles refund calculations, access period management, and member notification.

query.description: Include subscription history and billing records (optional)
Include billing details and payment methods (optional)

request.description: Retrieves the current active subscription for a specific member including plan details, billing information, access permissions, and membership status.
Generates a new invoice for member services such as membership fees, personal training sessions, or other gym services.
Retrieves all invoices for a specific member.
Cancels an invoice that has not been paid. Cancelled invoices cannot be reinstated.

body.raw:
{
  "invoiceId": "invoice_1234567890abcdef",
  "amount": 99.99,
  "paymentMethod": "credit_card",
  "paymentDate": "2024-01-15",
  "transactionId": "txn_9876543210fedcba",
  "reference": "Payment for INV-2024-001",
  "notes": "Paid via online portal",
  "processedBy": "usr_1234567890abcdef"
}

request.description: Records a payment for an invoice. Supports multiple payment methods including cash, credit/debit cards, and bank transfers.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific payment transaction.

item.name: 📅 Attendance
item.description: Check-in/check-out tracking for members and trainers

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 1001,
  "attendanceType": "gym_visit",
  "checkInTime": "2025-12-26T09:00:00Z",
  "branchId": "branch-123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "notes": "Morning workout session"
}

request.description:
Records a check-in for members or trainers at the gym or for specific classes.

**Examples:**
1. **Gym Visit:** General facility check-in
2. **Class Attendance:** Specific class enrollment
3. **Trainer Check-in:** Trainer arrival for work
Records the check-out time for a member or trainer. Calculates duration and updates attendance records with session completion details.
Retrieves all attendance records across the system including check-in/out times, session durations, and attendance types.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific attendance record including check-in/out times, session duration, member/trainer details, and any notes recorded during the session.
Retrieves all attendance records for a specific member including gym visits, class attendance, and trainer sessions. Useful for members to track their workout history.
Retrieves all attendance records for a specific trainer including arrival times, class sessions, and work hours tracking.
Retrieves all attendance records for a specific branch including member visits, trainer arrivals, and class attendance. Useful for branch managers to monitor facility usage.

Retrieves comprehensive gym dashboard analytics including:
- Today's metrics (payments, attendance, admissions)
- Member statistics (total, active, inactive, expiring, birthdays)
- Resource counts (trainers, classes)
- Revenue trends
- Member growth trends
- Recent payments
Retrieves member analytics for a specific branch including membership statistics, demographics, and trends.
Retrieves attendance analytics for a gym including peak hours, popular classes, and member visit patterns.

item.name: 🎯 Fitness Tracking
item.description: Workout plans, diet plans, progress tracking, and goals

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 123,
  "planName": "Strength Building Program",
  "description": "8-week progressive strength training program",
  "duration": 56,
  "durationUnit": "days",
  "difficulty": "intermediate",
  "goals": ["Increase strength", "Build muscle mass"],
  "exercises": [
    {
      "name": "Bench Press",
      "sets": 4,
      "reps": 8,
      "weight": 135,
      "weightUnit": "lbs",
      "restTime": 120,
      "notes": "Focus on controlled movement"
    }
  ],
  "schedule": {
    "frequency": 3,
    "daysPerWeek": ["monday", "wednesday", "friday"]
  }
}

request.description: Creates a structured workout plan for a member with specific exercises, sets, reps, and scheduling.
Retrieves all active workout plans assigned to a specific member, including progress tracking and completion status.

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 123,
  "workoutDate": "2024-01-01",
  "duration": 90,
  "exercises": [
    {
      "exerciseName": "Bench Press",
      "sets": 3,
      "reps": 12,
      "weight": 135,
      "weightUnit": "lbs",
      "notes": "Felt strong today"
    },
    {
      "exerciseName": "Squats",
      "sets": 4,
      "reps": 10,
      "weight": 185,
      "weightUnit": "lbs",
      "notes": "Good form maintained"
    }
  ],
  "overallNotes": "Great workout session, felt energized"
}

request.description: Records a completed workout session with exercises, sets, reps, and other performance metrics.
Retrieves all workout logs for a specific member with optional filtering by date range and workout type.
Creates a personalized diet plan for a member with meal recommendations, nutritional guidelines, and dietary restrictions.

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 123,
  "measurementDate": "2024-01-01",
  "weight": 165.5,
  "height": 70,
  "bodyFat": 18.2,
  "muscleMass": 125.8,
  "measurements": {
    "chest": 40.5,
    "waist": 32.0,
    "hips": 38.5,
    "arms": 13.2,
    "thighs": 22.1
  },
  "photos": {
    "front": "progress_photo_front_123.jpg",
    "side": "progress_photo_side_123.jpg",
    "back": "progress_photo_back_123.jpg"
  },
  "notes": "Great progress this month! Weight is trending down"
}

request.description: Records body measurement and progress data for a member. Used to track fitness journey and goal achievement.

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 123,
  "title": "Lose 10 pounds",
  "description": "Achieve target weight through diet and exercise",
  "category": "weight_loss",
  "targetValue": 10,
  "targetUnit": "lbs",
  "targetDate": "2024-06-01",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "active",
  "notes": "Focus on cardio 3x per week and balanced diet"
}

request.description: Creates a fitness goal for a member. Goals can be created by trainers or administrators and assigned to specific members.
Updates an existing goal. Can modify target values, deadlines, status, or add progress notes.

item.name: 👥 User & Roles
item.description: User management and role-based access control

body.raw:
{
  "email": "admin@gym.com",
  "password": "AdminPass123!",
  "roleId": "role_admin_123",
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Admin"
}

request.description: Creates a new user account with the provided details. Requires admin privileges.
Retrieves a list of all users in the system. Requires admin privileges.
Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user.
Retrieves a list of all available user roles in the system (e.g., SUPERADMIN, ADMIN, TRAINER, MEMBER).

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "John Doe",
  "email": "john.doe@example.com",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "source": "website",
  "branchId": "branch_123",
  "message": "Interested in membership plans and facility tour",
  "preferredContactMethod": "email"
}

request.description: Creates a new customer inquiry from potential members. This is a public endpoint for lead generation and customer acquisition.
Retrieves inquiries with filtering and pagination. Requires admin or staff privileges.
Converts a lead inquiry into a full member account. Creates member profile and sends welcome email.

body.raw:
{
  "memberId": 123,
  "trainerId": 456,
  "startDate": "2024-01-01",
  "endDate": "2024-06-01",
  "sessionFrequency": 2,
  "notes": "Focus on weight loss and strength building"
}

request.description: Creates a training assignment between a member and trainer. This establishes their professional relationship for personal training sessions.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific trainer-member assignment including session history.
Retrieves all classes across all branches for a specific gym. Useful for gym owners to view comprehensive class offerings.

exec: // Store JWT token automatically after login

variable.description: Base URL of the API server
JWT authentication token - automatically set after login
Current user ID - automatically set after login
